name: Date Bars/Kimberly
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the margarine, shortening, salt, brown sugar, flour, and baking soda.
2. Add the oatmeal to the mixture and stir until well combined.
3. Press half of the mixture into a greased 13 x 9 inch pan.
4. Save the remaining mixture for later.
5. Prepare the topping by mixing chopped dates, white sugar, and water in a saucepan over low heat for about 10 minutes.
6. Spread the cooked topping evenly over the bottom layer.
7. Sprinkle the oatmeal mixture evenly over the top of the pan.
8. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 25-30 minutes.
9. Remove from the oven and let cool before cutting into bars.
Enjoy!
